entity.name: trdc_postcode
entity.query: WITH index_base AS ( SELECT 'trdc_postcode'::text AS subclass, id AS id_in_class, 'id' AS id_name, 'int:n' AS id_type, CASE WHEN "SITE_NAME" IS NOT NULL AND trim("SITE_NAME") <> '' THEN postcode || ' - ' || "SITE_NAME" || ', ' || COALESCE("TOWN", '') ELSE postcode END AS displaytext, replace(upper(postcode), ' ', '') AS search_part_1, trim(COALESCE("SITE_NAME", '') || ' ' || COALESCE("TOWN", '')) AS search_part_2, geom AS geom FROM local_authority."CodePoint_Open_TRDC_with_street" WHERE postcode IS NOT NULL AND trim(postcode) <> '' ) SELECT (array_to_json(array_append(ARRAY[subclass::text], id_in_class::text)))::text AS id, displaytext AS display, search_part_1 AS search_1_stem, NULLIF(trim(search_part_2), '') AS search_2_stem, displaytext AS sort, subclass AS facet, 'trdc' AS tenant, (array_to_json(array_append(ARRAY[id_name::text], id_type::text)))::text AS idfield_meta, (st_asgeojson(st_envelope(geom), 0, 1)::json -> 'bbox')::text AS bbox, st_srid(geom) as srid FROM index_base
